query:
SELECT
  la.id AS assoc_id,
  la.tenantId AS assoc_tenantId,
  la.labelCode,
  la.productId,
  p.sku AS product_sku,
  p.tenantId AS product_tenantId,
  t.name AS tenant_correto,
  la.batch,
  la.unitsPerBox,
  la.associatedAt,
  CASE
    WHEN p.tenantId = 1 THEN 'OK — produto é do tenant 1 (Med@x)'
    WHEN p.tenantId IS NULL THEN 'ATENÇÃO — produto sem tenant'
    ELSE CONCAT('INCORRETO — produto pertence ao tenant ', p.tenantId)
  END AS diagnostico
FROM labelAssociations la
LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = la.productId
LEFT JOIN tenants t ON t.id = p.tenantId
WHERE la.tenantId = 1
ORDER BY diagnostico DESC, la.associatedAt DESC
LIMIT 100;
